prompt: Create a realistic vertical portrait photograph of an Indian woman standing on a tropical beach at sunset, framed from mid-thigh to above the head. She has long, flowing, soft, voluminous brown hair with gentle loose curls cascading over both shoulders and down her back, natural free-flowing texture, center part, glossy highlights, and wind-touched strands. She wears an elegant black sheer embroidered saree with a matching black blouse, with delicate floral lace embroidery, translucent net fabric draped over one shoulder and across the torso, and a sophisticated evening look. Her pose is relaxed and graceful, facing the camera, one arm hanging naturally and the other hand lightly resting near the waist. The face area should be intentionally obscured by a plain rectangular skin-tone placeholder block centered over the face, covering the facial features from forehead to chin while leaving the hair, neck, and outfit visible. Background: shallow-depth-of-field tropical shoreline with turquoise ocean waves on the left, pale sandy beach on the right, blurred palm trees and lush greenery in the distance, warm peach-orange sunset sky, golden-hour lighting, soft bokeh, cinematic travel-fashion photography. Use natural skin tones, realistic fabric transparency, high detail in hair and saree embroidery, vertical 2:3 composition, no text, no watermark, no extra people.
